queries.name: list_ec2_instances
queries.query_text: select instance_id, instance_state, instance_type, placement_availability_zone from aws_ec2_instance;

queries.name: list_s3_buckets
queries.query_text: select name, region, account_id, creation_date from aws_s3_bucket;

queries.name: list_iam_users
queries.query_text: select name, user_id, path, create_date, password_last_used from aws_iam_user;

queries.name: list_rds_instances
queries.query_text: select db_instance_identifier, class, engine, engine_version, db_instance_status from aws_rds_db_instance;

queries.name: ec2_count_by_az_and_type
queries.query_text: select placement_availability_zone as az, instance_type, count(*) from aws_ec2_instance group by placement_availability_zone, instance_type;

queries.name: s3_buckets_versioning_disabled
queries.query_text: select name, region, account_id, versioning_enabled from aws_s3_bucket where not versioning_enabled;

queries.name: s3_buckets_default_encryption_disabled
queries.query_text: select name, server_side_encryption_configuration from aws_s3_bucket where server_side_encryption_configuration is null;

queries.name: s3_buckets_public_policy
queries.query_text: select name, bucket_policy_is_public from aws_s3_bucket where bucket_policy_is_public;

queries.name: ec2_detailed_monitoring_disabled
queries.query_text: select instance_id, monitoring_state from aws_ec2_instance where monitoring_state = 'disabled';

queries.name: rds_iam_auth_disabled
queries.query_text: select db_instance_identifier, iam_database_authentication_enabled from aws_rds_db_instance where not iam_database_authentication_enabled;

queries.name: iam_access_keys_inactive
queries.query_text: select access_key_id, user_name, status from aws_iam_access_key where status = 'Inactive';

queries.name: iam_access_key_count_by_user
queries.query_text: select user_name, count(access_key_id) as access_key_count from aws_iam_access_key group by user_name;

queries.name: ec2_count_by_instance_type
queries.query_text: select instance_type, count(instance_type) as count from aws_ec2_instance group by instance_type;

queries.name: list_ec2_instances_limit_5
queries.query_text: select instance_id, instance_state from aws_ec2_instance limit 5;

queries.name: cis_2_3_iam_root_access_keys
queries.query_text: select account_id, account_access_keys_present from aws_iam_account_summary where account_access_keys_present > 0

queries.name: cis_2_4_iam_root_mfa
queries.query_text: select account_id, account_mfa_enabled, account_password_present from aws_iam_account_summary where account_mfa_enabled = 0 and account_password_present = 1

queries.name: cis_2_7_iam_password_min_length
queries.query_text: select minimum_password_length from aws_iam_account_password_policy where minimum_password_length < 14 or minimum_password_length is null

queries.name: cis_2_8_iam_password_reuse
queries.query_text: select password_reuse_prevention from aws_iam_account_password_policy where password_reuse_prevention is null or password_reuse_prevention = 0

queries.name: cis_2_9_iam_user_mfa
queries.query_text: select u.name, u.user_id, u.create_date, u.mfa_enabled from aws_iam_user u where u.password_last_used is not null and (not u.mfa_enabled or u.mfa_enabled is null)

queries.name: cis_2_11_iam_credentials_unused
queries.query_text: select access_key_id, user_name, status, create_date, last_used from aws_iam_access_key where status = 'Active' and (last_used is null or last_used < (now() - interval '45 days'))

queries.name: cis_2_12_iam_single_access_key
queries.query_text: select user_name, count(*) as access_key_count from aws_iam_access_key where status = 'Active' group by user_name having count(*) > 1

queries.name: cis_2_13_iam_access_key_rotation
queries.query_text: select access_key_id, user_name, create_date from aws_iam_access_key where status = 'Active' and create_date < (now() - interval '90 days')

queries.name: cis_2_14_iam_permissions_via_groups
queries.query_text: select u.name as user_name, u.user_id from aws_iam_user u where u.attached_policy_arns is not null and jsonb_array_length(u.attached_policy_arns) > 0 and (u.groups is null or jsonb_array_length(u.groups) = 0)

queries.name: cis_2_15_iam_admin_policies
queries.query_text: select name as user_name, split_part(attachments, '/', 2) as attached_policy from aws_iam_user cross join jsonb_array_elements_text(attached_policy_arns) as attachments where split_part(attachments, '/', 2) = 'AdministratorAccess' union all select r.name as role_name, split_part(attachments, '/', 2) as attached_policy from aws_iam_role r cross join jsonb_array_elements_text(attached_policy_arns) as attachments where split_part(attachments, '/', 2) = 'AdministratorAccess'

queries.name: cis_2_16_iam_support_role
queries.query_text: select a.account_id from aws_account a where not exists (select 1 from aws_iam_role r where r.attached_policy_arns::text like '%AWSSupportAccess%')

queries.name: cis_2_17_iam_instance_roles
queries.query_text: select instance_id, instance_state, iam_instance_profile_arn from aws_ec2_instance where iam_instance_profile_arn is null and instance_state != 'terminated'

queries.name: cis_2_18_iam_expired_certificates
queries.query_text: select name, certificate_id, upload_date, expiration from aws_iam_server_certificate where expiration < now()

queries.name: cis_2_19_iam_access_analyzer
queries.query_text: select region, name, status from aws_accessanalyzer_analyzer where status != 'ACTIVE'

queries.name: cis_3_1_1_s3_deny_http
queries.query_text: select name, region, account_id, bucket_policy from aws_s3_bucket where bucket_policy is null or bucket_policy::text not like '%aws:SecureTransport%' and bucket_policy::text not like '%false%'

queries.name: cis_3_1_4_s3_public_access
queries.query_text: select name, block_public_acls, block_public_policy, ignore_public_acls, restrict_public_buckets from aws_s3_bucket where not block_public_acls or not block_public_policy or not ignore_public_acls or not restrict_public_buckets

queries.name: cis_3_2_1_rds_encryption
queries.query_text: select db_instance_identifier, storage_encrypted from aws_rds_db_instance where storage_encrypted = false

queries.name: cis_3_2_2_rds_auto_upgrade
queries.query_text: select db_instance_identifier, auto_minor_version_upgrade from aws_rds_db_instance where auto_minor_version_upgrade = false

queries.name: cis_3_2_3_rds_public
queries.query_text: select db_instance_identifier, publicly_accessible from aws_rds_db_instance where publicly_accessible = true

queries.name: cis_3_3_1_efs_encryption
queries.query_text: select file_system_id, name, encrypted from aws_efs_file_system where encrypted = false

queries.name: cis_4_2_cloudtrail_validation
queries.query_text: select name, region, log_file_validation_enabled from aws_cloudtrail_trail where log_file_validation_enabled = false

queries.name: cis_4_3_config_enabled
queries.query_text: select name, region, recording from aws_config_configuration_recorder where recording = false

queries.name: cis_4_5_cloudtrail_kms
queries.query_text: select name, region, kms_key_id from aws_cloudtrail_trail where kms_key_id is null

queries.name: cis_4_6_kms_rotation
queries.query_text: select k.id, k.region, k.key_rotation_enabled from aws_kms_key k where k.key_manager = 'CUSTOMER' and (not k.key_rotation_enabled or k.key_rotation_enabled is null)

queries.name: cis_4_7_vpc_flow_logs
queries.query_text: select v.vpc_id, v.region from aws_vpc v where not exists (select 1 from aws_vpc_flow_log f where f.resource_id = v.vpc_id and f.deliver_logs_status = 'SUCCESS')

queries.name: cis_4_8_s3_write_logging
queries.query_text: select name, region from aws_s3_bucket where not exists (select 1 from aws_cloudtrail_trail t, jsonb_array_elements(t.event_selectors) as es where (es->'DataResources')::text like '%s3%' and es->>'ReadWriteType' = 'Write')

queries.name: cis_4_9_s3_read_logging
queries.query_text: select name, region from aws_s3_bucket where not exists (select 1 from aws_cloudtrail_trail t, jsonb_array_elements(t.event_selectors) as es where (es->'DataResources')::text like '%s3%' and (es->>'ReadWriteType' = 'ReadOnly' or es->>'ReadWriteType' = 'All'))

queries.name: cis_5_16_security_hub_enabled
queries.query_text: select region from aws_region r where not exists (select 1 from aws_securityhub_hub h where h.region = r.region)

queries.name: cis_6_1_1_ebs_encryption_default
queries.query_text: select region, default_ebs_encryption_enabled from aws_ec2_regional_settings where default_ebs_encryption_enabled = false

queries.name: cis_6_1_2_cifs_restricted
queries.query_text: select sg.group_id, sg.group_name, sg.vpc_id, r.from_port, r.to_port, r.cidr_ipv4, r.cidr_ipv6 from aws_vpc_security_group sg join aws_vpc_security_group_rule r on sg.group_id = r.group_id where not r.is_egress and r.from_port <= 445 and r.to_port >= 445 and (r.cidr_ipv4 = '0.0.0.0/0' or r.cidr_ipv6 = '::/0')

queries.name: cis_6_2_nacl_admin_ports
queries.query_text: select acl.network_acl_id, acl.region, acl.account_id from aws_vpc_network_acl acl, jsonb_array_elements(acl.entries) as att where att->>'Egress' = 'false' and (att->>'CidrBlock' = '0.0.0.0/0' or att->>'Ipv6CidrBlock' = '::/0') and att->>'RuleAction' = 'allow' and ((att->>'Protocol' = '-1' and att->'PortRange' is null) or (att->'PortRange' is not null and att->>'Protocol' in ('6','17') and (((att->'PortRange'->>'From')::int <= 22 and (att->'PortRange'->>'To')::int >= 22) or ((att->'PortRange'->>'From')::int <= 3389 and (att->'PortRange'->>'To')::int >= 3389))))

queries.name: cis_6_3_sg_admin_ports_ipv4
queries.query_text: select sg.group_id, sg.group_name, r.from_port, r.to_port, r.cidr_ipv4 from aws_vpc_security_group sg join aws_vpc_security_group_rule r on sg.group_id = r.group_id where not r.is_egress and r.cidr_ipv4 = '0.0.0.0/0' and ((r.from_port <= 22 and r.to_port >= 22) or (r.from_port <= 3389 and r.to_port >= 3389))

queries.name: cis_6_4_sg_admin_ports_ipv6
queries.query_text: select sg.group_id, sg.group_name, r.from_port, r.to_port, r.cidr_ipv6 from aws_vpc_security_group sg join aws_vpc_security_group_rule r on sg.group_id = r.group_id where not r.is_egress and r.cidr_ipv6 = '::/0' and ((r.from_port <= 22 and r.to_port >= 22) or (r.from_port <= 3389 and r.to_port >= 3389))

queries.name: cis_6_5_default_sg_restricts_traffic
queries.query_text: select sg.group_id, sg.group_name, sg.vpc_id from aws_vpc_security_group sg where sg.group_name = 'default' and exists (select 1 from aws_vpc_security_group_rule r where r.group_id = sg.group_id and not r.is_egress and (r.cidr_ipv4 = '0.0.0.0/0' or r.cidr_ipv6 = '::/0'))

queries.name: cis_6_7_ec2_imdsv2
queries.query_text: select instance_id, instance_state, metadata_options from aws_ec2_instance where (metadata_options->>'HttpTokens') is distinct from 'required' and instance_state != 'terminated'
